name: slash command: exit codes 0 (success), 1 (assertion failed), 2 (usage/infra error) consistently used
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" --help; c1=$?; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh"; c2=$?; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" --does-not-exist; c3=$?; [ "$c1" = "0" ] && [ "$c2" = "2" ] && [ "$c3" = "2" ] && echo ok 1>&2
